en.title: Ilkhom Makhkamov, Minister of Transport, and Shukhratbek Abdurakhmanov, Governor of Andijan Region, visited and rode the company's exported pure electric buses.
en.summary: Ilkhom Makhkamov, Minister of Transport, and Shukhratbek Abdurakhmanov, Governor of Andijan Region, visited and rode the company's exported pure electric buses.
body: Ilkhom Makhkamov, Minister of Transport, and Shukhratbek Abdurakhmanov, Governor of Andijan Region, visited and rode the company's exported pure electric buses.

ru.title: Министр транспорта Ильхом Махкамов и губернатор Андижанской области Шухратбек Абдурахманов посетили и проехали на экспортируемых чистых электробусах компании.
ru.summary: Министр транспорта Ильхом Махкамов и губернатор Андижанской области Шухратбек Абдурахманов посетили и проехали на экспортируемых чистых электробусах компании.
body: Министр транспорта Ильхом Махкамов и губернатор Андижанской области Шухратбек Абдурахманов посетили и проехали на экспортируемых чистых электробусах компании.

en.title: Uzbekistan Delegation Visits Lanzhou for Inspection and Exchange
en.summary: In February 2025, a government and public transport delegation from Uzbekistan visited Lanzhou Guangtong and Dele Technology. During the visit, the delegation toured the production workshops and export-oriented vehicle m...
body: In February 2025, a government and public transport delegation from Uzbekistan visited Lanzhou Guangtong and Dele Technology. During the visit, the delegation toured the production workshops and export-oriented vehicle models, and the two sides held in-depth exchanges on market demand, technologies and other aspects. Relevant company officials gave the delegation a detailed introduction to the company’s market positioning and main vehicle models. The delegation highly recognized the company’s export system and market solutions.

Later, Luo Yaozong, Deputy Director of the Administrative Committee of Lanzhou New Area, held talks with the Uzbek representatives. The delegation briefed Director Luo Yaozong on the market prospects and investment environment in Uzbekistan. Both sides expressed their expectation to seek more cooperation opportunities, unite and cooperate, and promote industrial progress and pursue high-quality development with a win-win mindset.

On the following day, key leaders of the company accompanied the Uzbek delegation on a visit to the Operation Command Center of Lanzhou Public Transport Group. The group received a detailed introduction to public transport dispatching and maintenance operations. Subsequently, the delegation inspected the bus charging station operated by Dele Technology.

uz.title: Oʻzbekiston delegatsiyasi tekshirish va almashinuv uchun Lanzhouga tashrif buyurdi
uz.summary: 2025-yil fevral oyida O'zbekiston hukumati va jamoat transporti delegatsiyasi Lanzhou Guangtong va Dele Technology kompaniyalariga tashrif buyurdi. Tashrif davomida delegatsiya ishlab chiqarish ustaxonalari va eksportga yo'naltirilgan avtomobillar...
body: 2025-yil fevral oyida O'zbekiston hukumati va jamoat transporti delegatsiyasi Lanzhou Guangtong va Dele Technology kompaniyalariga tashrif buyurdi. Tashrif davomida delegatsiya ishlab chiqarish ustaxonalari va eksportga yo'naltirilgan avtomobil modellarini ko'zdan kechirdi va ikki tomon bozor talabi, texnologiyalar va boshqa jihatlar bo'yicha chuqur fikr almashdilar. Tegishli kompaniya rasmiylari delegatsiyaga kompaniyaning bozordagi o'rni va asosiy avtomobil modellari haqida batafsil ma'lumot berishdi. Delegatsiya kompaniyaning eksport tizimi va bozor yechimlarini yuqori baholadi.

Keyinchalik, Lanchjou Yangi hududi Ma'muriy qo'mitasi direktorining o'rinbosari Luo Yaozong o'zbekistonlik vakillari bilan muzokaralar olib bordi. Delegatsiya direktor Luo Yaozongga O'zbekistondagi bozor istiqbollari va investitsiya muhiti haqida ma'lumot berdi. Ikkala tomon ham ko'proq hamkorlik imkoniyatlarini izlash, birlashish va hamkorlik qilish, sanoat taraqqiyotini rag'batlantirish va o'zaro manfaatli fikrlash tarzida yuqori sifatli rivojlanishga intilishlarini bildirdilar.

Ertasi kuni kompaniyaning asosiy rahbarlari O'zbekiston delegatsiyasiga Lanzhou jamoat transporti guruhining Operatsion boshqaruv markaziga tashrif buyurishdi. Guruh jamoat transportini dispetcherlik qilish va texnik xizmat ko'rsatish operatsiyalari bilan batafsil tanishdi. Shundan so'ng, delegatsiya Dele Technology tomonidan boshqariladigan avtobus zaryadlash stansiyasini ko'zdan kechirdi.

ru.title: Делегация Узбекистана посетила Ланьчжоу для инспекции и обмена
ru.summary: В феврале 2025 года правительственная и транспортная делегация из Узбекистана посетила Ланьчжоу Гуантун и Деле Технолоджи. В ходе визита делегация осмотрела производственные цеха и экспортоориентированные автомобильные м...
body: В феврале 2025 года правительственная и транспортная делегация из Узбекистана посетила Ланьчжоу Гуантун и Деле Технолоджи. В ходе визита делегация ознакомилась с производственными цехами и экспортоориентированными моделями транспортных средств, а также провела углубленный обмен мнениями по рыночному спросу, технологиям и другим аспектам. Соответствующие должностные лица компании подробно ознакомили делегацию с позиционированием компании на рынке и основными моделями транспортных средств. высоко оценили экспортную систему и рыночные решения компании.

Позднее с узбекскими представителями провели переговоры заместитель директора Административного комитета нового района Ланьчжоу Ло Яоцзун. Делегация ознакомила директора Ло Яоцзуна с перспективами рынка и инвестиционной средой в Узбекистане. Обе стороны выразили надежду на то, что они будут искать больше возможностей для сотрудничества, объединяться и сотрудничать, а также содействовать промышленному прогрессу и добиваться высококачественного развития с беспроигрышным мышлением.

На следующий день ключевые руководители компании сопровождали узбекскую делегацию с визитом в оперативный командный центр группы общественного транспорта Ланьчжоу. Группа получила подробное представление об операциях по диспетчеризации и техническому обслуживанию общественного транспорта. Впоследствии делегация осмотрела станцию зарядки автобусов, эксплуатируемую Dele Technology.

en.title: The Party Committee Secretary and President of China Exim Bank Gansu Branch, Gao Zefeng, and His Team Visit Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy for Research and Guidance
en.summary: On January 9, 2025, Gao Zefeng, the Party Committee Secretary and President of China Exim Bank Gansu Branch, and his team visited Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile for research and guidance. Our company's chairman,...
body: On January 9, 2025, Gao Zefeng, the Party Committee Secretary and President of China Exim Bank Gansu Branch, and his team visited Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile for research and guidance. Our company's chairman, Yang Jian and heads of relevant departments accompanied the visit and reported on our company's development.

During the survey, President Gao and his team visited our company's production line and technology exhibition hall. At the symposium, Chairman Yang Jian gave a detailed introduction to the company's development, key vehicle models, power batteries, and overseas markets. President Gao affirmed and encouraged our company's overseas business. Both sides had an in-depth exchange on the difficulties and issues the company currently faces in financing, clarified the intention to cooperate, and specifically formulated a business implementation plan.

Through this survey, the mutual understanding and trust between the bank and the enterprise have been further deepened, laying a solid foundation for cooperation in a wider range of fields. With the strong support of China Exim Bank Gansu Branch, our company will also accelerate our overseas business and promote a new model of multi - sided development. By mobilizing the resource advantages of both sides, a new chapter of bank - enterprise cooperation and mutual benefit will be jointly written.

uz.title: Xitoy Eksim Bankining Gansu filiali partiya qo'mitasi kotibi va prezidenti Gao Zefeng va uning jamoasi tadqiqot va rahbarlik uchun Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy kompaniyasiga tashrif buyurishdi
uz.summary: 2025-yil 9-yanvarda Xitoy Eksim Banki Gansu filiali partiya qo'mitasi kotibi va prezidenti Gao Zefeng va uning jamoasi tadqiqot va ko'rsatmalar olish uchun Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile kompaniyasiga tashrif buyurishdi. Kompaniyamiz raisi...
body: 2025-yil 9-yanvarda Xitoy Eksim Banki Gansu filiali partiya qo'mitasi kotibi va prezidenti Gao Zefeng va uning jamoasi tadqiqot va ko'rsatmalar olish uchun Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile kompaniyasiga tashrif buyurishdi. Kompaniyamiz raisi Yang Jian va tegishli bo'lim rahbarlari tashrifga hamrohlik qilishdi va kompaniyamizning rivojlanishi haqida hisobot berishdi.

So'rov davomida Prezident Gao va uning jamoasi kompaniyamizning ishlab chiqarish liniyasi va texnologiyalar ko'rgazma zaliga tashrif buyurishdi. Simpoziumda rais Yang Jian kompaniyaning rivojlanishi, asosiy avtomobil modellari, quvvat batareyalari va xorijiy bozorlar haqida batafsil ma'lumot berdi. Prezident Gao kompaniyamizning xorijiy biznesini tasdiqladi va rag'batlantirdi. Ikkala tomon ham kompaniyaning hozirda moliyalashtirishda duch kelayotgan qiyinchiliklari va muammolari haqida chuqur fikr almashdilar, aniqlik kiritdilar. hamkorlik qilish niyati va biznesni amalga oshirish rejasini aniq ishlab chiqdi.

Ushbu so'rovnoma orqali bank va korxona o'rtasidagi o'zaro tushunish va ishonch yanada chuqurlashdi, bu esa kengroq sohalarda hamkorlik uchun mustahkam poydevor yaratdi. Xitoy Eksim Banki Gansu filialining kuchli ko'magi bilan bizning kompaniyamiz ham xorijdagi biznesimizni jadallashtiradi va ko'p qirrali rivojlanishning yangi modelini ilgari suradi. Ikkala tomonning resurs afzalliklarini safarbar qilish orqali bank va korxona hamkorligining yangi bobi boshlanadi. va o'zaro manfaatlar birgalikda yoziladi.

ru.title: Секретарь партийного комитета и президент филиала Эксимбанка Китая в Ганьсу Гао Цзэфэн и его команда посещают Ланьчжоу Гуантун для исследований и руководства
ru.summary: 9 января 2025 года Гао Цзэфэн, секретарь партийного комитета и президент филиала China Exim Bank Gansu, и его команда посетили Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile для проведения исследований и консультаций. Председатель нашей компании,...
body: 9 января 2025 года Гао Цзэфэн, секретарь партийного комитета и президент филиала China Exim Bank Gansu, и его команда посетили Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile для проведения исследований и консультаций. Председатель нашей компании Ян Цзянь и руководители профильных подразделений сопровождали визит и отчитывались о развитии нашей компании.

В ходе сюрвея президент Гао и его команда посетили производственную линию нашей компании и технологический выставочный зал. На симпозиуме председатель Ян Цзянь подробно рассказал о развитии компании, ключевых моделях автомобилей, силовых батареях и зарубежных рынках. Президент Гао подтвердил и поддержал зарубежный бизнес нашей компании. Обе стороны провели углубленный обмен мнениями о трудностях и проблемах, с которыми компания в настоящее время сталкивается в финансировании, уточнил намерение сотрудничать, и специально сформулировал план реализации бизнеса.

Благодаря этому исследованию взаимопонимание и доверие между банком и предприятием еще больше углубились, заложив прочную основу для сотрудничества в более широком спектре областей. При сильной поддержке филиала China Exim Bank в Ганьсу наша компания также ускорит наш зарубежный бизнес и будет продвигать новую модель многостороннего развития. Мобилизуя ресурсные преимущества обеих сторон, новая глава сотрудничества банк - предприятие и взаимная выгода будут написаны совместно.

en.title: Lanzhou Guangtong Accompanies Gansu Delegation on European Visit and Negotiations
en.summary: From November 18th to 24th, 2024, Cheng Xiaobo, a member of the Gansu Provincial Committee and the Executive Deputy Governor of Gansu Province, led a friendly delegation to visit Switzerland and Moldova. During the visit...
body: From November 18th to 24th, 2024, Cheng Xiaobo, a member of the Gansu Provincial Committee and the Executive Deputy Governor of Gansu Province, led a friendly delegation to visit Switzerland and Moldova. During the visit, our company's Chairman, Mr. Yang Jian, introduced our electric bus products to the Mayor and Deputy Mayor in charge of Chisinau, the capital city of Moldova, and exchanged information with their public transportation officials, reaching a preliminary cooperation plan. Both sides believe that electric buses are the direction of future development and have a huge demand in the European market. Meeting the needs and concerns of public transportation customers and providing a financial solution platform is key to expanding the market.

uz.title: Lanzhou Guangtong Gansu delegatsiyasiga Yevropa tashrifi va muzokaralarida hamrohlik qilmoqda
uz.summary: 2024-yil 18-noyabrdan 24-noyabrgacha Gansu provinsiyasi qo'mitasi a'zosi va Gansu provinsiyasi gubernatorining ijrochi o'rinbosari Cheng Syaobo Shveytsariya va Moldovaga tashrif buyurgan do'stona delegatsiyaga boshchilik qildi. Tashrif davomida...
body: 2024-yil 18-noyabrdan 24-noyabrgacha Gansu provinsiyasi qo'mitasi a'zosi va Gansu provinsiyasi gubernatorining ijrochi o'rinbosari Cheng Syaobo Shveytsariya va Moldovaga tashrif buyurgan do'stona delegatsiyaga boshchilik qildi. Tashrif davomida kompaniyamiz raisi janob Yang Jian Moldova poytaxti Kishinyov meri va mer o'rinbosariga bizning elektr avtobus mahsulotlarimizni taqdim etdi va ularning jamoat transporti xodimlari bilan ma'lumot almashdi. Dastlabki hamkorlik rejasi. Ikkala tomon ham elektr avtobuslari kelajakdagi rivojlanish yo'nalishi ekanligiga va Yevropa bozorida katta talabga ega ekanligiga ishonishadi. Jamoat transporti mijozlarining ehtiyojlari va tashvishlarini qondirish hamda moliyaviy yechim platformasini taqdim etish bozorni kengaytirishning kalitidir.

ru.title: Ланьчжоу Гуантун сопровождает делегацию Ганьсу на европейском визите и переговорах
ru.summary: С 18 по 24 ноября 2024 года Чэн Сяобо, член провинциального комитета Ганьсу и исполнительный заместитель губернатора провинции Ганьсу, возглавил дружественную делегацию, посетившую Швейцарию и Молдову. Во время визита...
body: С 18 по 24 ноября 2024 года Чэн Сяобо, член провинциального комитета Ганьсу и исполнительный заместитель губернатора провинции Ганьсу, возглавил дружественную делегацию, посетившую Швейцарию и Молдову. Во время визита председатель нашей компании г-н Ян Цзянь представил нашу продукцию для электробусов мэру и заместителю мэра, отвечающему за Кишинев, столицу Молдовы, и обменялся информацией со своими должностными лицами общественного транспорта, достигнув предварительный план сотрудничества. Обе стороны считают, что электробусы являются направлением будущего развития и имеют огромный спрос на европейском рынке. Удовлетворение потребностей и проблем клиентов общественного транспорта и предоставление платформы финансовых решений является ключом к расширению рынка.

en.title: At the BUS2BUS cexhibition, Lanzhou Guangtong received a number of purchase intentions
en.summary: The exhibit at Lanzhou Guangtong booth drew a large crowd at the grand BUS2BUS exhibition, creating an extraordinary and bustling scene. The showcased pure electric city bus attracted numerous visitors and media to stop ...
body: The exhibit at Lanzhou Guangtong booth drew a large crowd at the grand BUS2BUS exhibition, creating an extraordinary and bustling scene. The showcased pure electric city bus attracted numerous visitors and media to stop and admire. Customers flocked to the negotiation area, leading to an exceptionally lively atmosphere.

The enthusiastic Lanzhou Guangtong representatives warmly communicated and negotiated with the visitors who came for inquiries. We reached purchase intentions and tender invitations with multiple customers. Our "1:1 electric bus solution" was recognized and praised by every customer. Visitors one after another boarded to experience and feel the exquisite comfort inside the bus.

uz.title: BUS2BUS ko'rgazmasida Lanzhou Guangtong bir qator xarid niyatlarini oldi
uz.summary: Lanzhou Guangtong stendida bo'lib o'tgan ko'rgazma ulkan BUS2BUS ko'rgazmasida katta olomonni jalb qildi va g'ayrioddiy va gavjum manzarani yaratdi. Namoyish etilgan sof elektr shahar avtobusi ko'plab tashrif buyuruvchilar va ommaviy axborot vositalarini to'xtatishga undadi ...
body: Lanzhou Guangtong stendida o'tkazilgan ko'rgazma ulkan BUS2BUS ko'rgazmasida katta olomonni jalb qildi va g'ayrioddiy va gavjum manzarani yaratdi. Namoyish etilgan sof elektr shahar avtobusi ko'plab tashrif buyuruvchilar va ommaviy axborot vositalarini to'xtab, hayratga solishga undadi. Mijozlar muzokara maydoniga to'planishdi, bu esa nihoyatda jonli muhitni yaratdi.

Lanzhou Guangtong vakillarining ishtiyoqi so'rab kelgan mehmonlar bilan iliq muloqot qildi va muzokaralar olib bordi. Biz bir nechta mijozlar bilan xarid qilish niyatlari va tender taklifnomalariga erishdik. Bizning "1:1 elektr avtobus yechimimiz" har bir mijoz tomonidan e'tirof etildi va olqishlandi. Mehmonlar birin-ketin avtobus ichidagi ajoyib qulaylikni his qilish va his qilish uchun avtobusga chiqishdi.

ru.title: На выставке BUS2BUS компания Lanzhou Guangtong получила ряд намерений о покупке
ru.summary: Экспозиция на стенде Lanzhou Guangtong собрала большую толпу на грандиозной выставке BUS2BUS, создав необыкновенную и шумную сцену. Демонстрируемый чистый электрический городской автобус привлек многочисленных посетителей и СМИ, чтобы остановить ...
body: The exhibit at Lanzhou Guangtong booth drew a large crowd at the grand BUS2BUS exhibition, creating an extraordinary and bustling scene. The showcased pure electric city bus attracted numerous visitors and media to stop and admire. Customers flocked to the negotiation area, leading to an exceptionally lively atmosphere.

The enthusiastic Lanzhou Guangtong representatives warmly communicated and negotiated with the visitors who came for inquiries. We reached purchase intentions and tender invitations with multiple customers. Our "1:1 electric bus solution" was recognized and praised by every customer. Visitors one after another boarded to experience and feel the exquisite comfort inside the bus.

en.title: "Once again Appeared! Lanzhou Guangtong pure electric city bus made a big debut at the Berlin BUS2BUS exhibition"
en.summary: On April 24th to 25th, the BUS2BUS exhibition was grandly held at the Berlin International Exhibition Center in Germany. Mr. Volker Wissing, German Federal Minister of Transpor t and Digitalization ， who had just returne...
body: On April 24th to 25th, the BUS2BUS exhibition was grandly held at the Berlin International Exhibition Center in Germany. Mr. Volker Wissing, German Federal Minister of Transpor t and Digitalization ， who had just returned from his visit to China, attended the opening ceremony and delivered a speech. As a barometer of the development trends in the German and European bus industry, the BUS2BUS exhibition focuses on future technology and sustainable solutions, providing comprehensive services for the public bus industry. This exhibition saw participation from over 140 companies from 20 countries. Leading-edge technologies, products, and key figures from around the world gathered here, showcasing core technologies and sparking innovative ideas.

Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile Co., Ltd., as the only outstanding representative of Chinese companies participating in the exhibition, unveiled its flagship product, the 12-meter LTO pure electric city bus, bringing a great surprise to the industry. Upon its appearing , the product immediately attracted attention and coverage from international clients and major media outlets.

This is the second time for Lanzhou Guangtong to participate in the international exhibition after the VDV electric bus exhibition in March. The CAMBELL electric bus project has been strongly supported by the NRW International Business Agency directly under the government of North Rhine-Westphalia and the Bottrop City Government in the initial stage of establishment and development. It is becoming one of the preferred products for European customers.

During the exhibition, representatives from Lanzhou Guangtong elaborated on the theme of the event, "We provide you with a 1:1 electric bus solution", and introduced the core advantages of LTO pure electric city buses.

"1:1" in this context refers to a "one-to-one" electric bus solution provided by Lanzhou Guangtong for customers. This solution is tailored to match the number of traditional fuel buses being replaced with electric buses, and it also includes the construction plan for charging stations. Specifically, it offers buses that comply with the German VDV standards, equipped with two types of batteries, LTO and LFP battery .

This means that compared to the diesel bus fleet, adopting a 1:1 electric bus solution can achieve a 1:1 ratio in terms of the number of vehicles, drivers, and operational schedules. This truly brings green, clean, and cost-effective electric buses to our customers.

The German industrial foundation is solid, and the entry standards are stringent. Lanzhou Guangtong has received praise and market recognition from local professionals due to our outstanding quality and strong capabilities, laying a solid foundation for expanding into the European market. Lanzhou Guangtong will allocate resources according to the diverse needs of different countries in Europe, providing tailored vehicle solutions and charging station construction plans, gradually advancing into various sectors of the European market.

uz.title: "Once again Appeared! Lanzhou Guangtong pure electric city bus made a big debut at the Berlin BUS2BUS exhibition"
uz.summary: On April 24th to 25th, the BUS2BUS exhibition was grandly held at the Berlin International Exhibition Center in Germany. Mr. Volker Wissing, German Federal Minister of Transpor t and Digitalization ， who had just returne...

Mr. Volker Wissing, German Federal Minister of Transpor t and Digitalization ， who had just returned from his visit to China, attended the opening ceremony and delivered a speech. As a barometer of the development trends in the German and European bus industry, the BUS2BUS exhibition focuses on future technology and sustainable solutions, providing comprehensive services for the public bus industry. This exhibition saw participation from over 140 companies from 20 countries. Leading-edge technologies, products, and key figures from around the world gathered here, showcasing core technologies and sparking innovative ideas.

Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile Co., Ltd., as the only outstanding representative of Chinese companies participating in the exhibition, unveiled its flagship product, the 12-meter LTO pure electric city bus, bringing a great surprise to the industry. This is the second time for Lanzhou Guangtong to participate in the international exhibition after the VDV electric bus exhibition in March. It is becoming one of the preferred products for European customers.

During the exhibition, representatives from Lanzhou Guangtong elaborated on the theme of the event, "We provide you with a 1:1 electric bus solution", and introduced the core advantages of LTO pure electric city buses.

"1:1" in this context refers to a "one-to-one" electric bus solution provided by Lanzhou Guangtong for customers. This solution is tailored to match the number of traditional fuel buses being replaced with electric buses, and it also includes the construction plan for charging stations. Specifically, it offers buses that comply with the German VDV standards, equipped with two types of batteries, LTO and LFP battery .

This means that compared to the diesel bus fleet, adopting a 1:1 electric bus solution can achieve a 1:1 ratio in terms of the number of vehicles, drivers, and operational schedules. This truly brings green, clean, and cost-effective electric buses to our customers.

The German industrial foundation is solid, and the entry standards are stringent. Lanzhou Guangtong has received praise and market recognition from local professionals due to our outstanding quality and strong capabilities, laying a solid foundation for expanding into the European market. Lanzhou Guangtong will allocate resources according to the diverse needs of different countries in Europe, providing tailored vehicle solutions and charging station construction plans, gradually advancing into various sectors of the European market.

ru.title: "Once again Appeared! Lanzhou Guangtong pure electric city bus made a big debut at the Berlin BUS2BUS exhibition"
ru.summary: On April 24th to 25th, the BUS2BUS exhibition was grandly held at the Berlin International Exhibition Center in Germany. Mr. Volker Wissing, German Federal Minister of Transpor t and Digitalization ， who had just returne...
body: On April 24th to 25th, the BUS2BUS exhibition was grandly held at the Berlin International Exhibition Center in Germany. Mr. Volker Wissing, German Federal Minister of Transpor t and Digitalization ， who had just returned from his visit to China, attended the opening ceremony and delivered a speech. As a barometer of the development trends in the German and European bus industry, the BUS2BUS exhibition focuses on future technology and sustainable solutions, providing comprehensive services for the public bus industry. This exhibition saw participation from over 140 companies from 20 countries. Leading-edge technologies, products, and key figures from around the world gathered here, showcasing core technologies and sparking innovative ideas.

Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile Co., Ltd., as the only outstanding representative of Chinese companies participating in the exhibition, unveiled its flagship product, the 12-meter LTO pure electric city bus, bringing a great surprise to the industry. Upon its appearing , the product immediately attracted attention and coverage from international clients and major media outlets.

This is the second time for Lanzhou Guangtong to participate in the international exhibition after the VDV electric bus exhibition in March. The CAMBELL electric bus project has been strongly supported by the NRW International Business Agency directly under the government of North Rhine-Westphalia and the Bottrop City Government in the initial stage of establishment and development. It is becoming one of the preferred products for European customers.

During the exhibition, representatives from Lanzhou Guangtong elaborated on the theme of the event, "We provide you with a 1:1 electric bus solution", and introduced the core advantages of LTO pure electric city buses.

"1:1" in this context refers to a "one-to-one" electric bus solution provided by Lanzhou Guangtong for customers. This solution is tailored to match the number of traditional fuel buses being replaced with electric buses, and it also includes the construction plan for charging stations. Specifically, it offers buses that comply with the German VDV standards, equipped with two types of batteries, LTO and LFP battery .

This means that compared to the diesel bus fleet, adopting a 1:1 electric bus solution can achieve a 1:1 ratio in terms of the number of vehicles, drivers, and operational schedules. This truly brings green, clean, and cost-effective electric buses to our customers.

The German industrial foundation is solid, and the entry standards are stringent. Lanzhou Guangtong has received praise and market recognition from local professionals due to our outstanding quality and strong capabilities, laying a solid foundation for expanding into the European market. Lanzhou Guangtong will allocate resources according to the diverse needs of different countries in Europe, providing tailored vehicle solutions and charging station construction plans, gradually advancing into various sectors of the European market.

en.title: Bright lights for production, unity and hard work to meet the deadline
en.summary: On November 30th, the night outside the window was as dark as ink, and everything was quiet. However, the production workshop in Lanzhou Guangtong was brightly lit and bustling with activity.
body: On November 30th, the night outside the window was as dark as ink, and everything was quiet. However, the production workshop in Lanzhou Guangtong was brightly lit and bustling with activity.

Under the blazing lights and beside the roaring machines, there were employees working tirelessly. The delivery schedule is imminent. In order to seize the limited production time, frontline personnel actively responded to the company's call, sacrificed their rest time, and put into production all night. Everyone was enthusiastic and obedient to orders, working overtime and rushing to work.

Continuous days of high-intensity work, fatigue and hard work can be imagined. But every Guangtong person knows the truth that "water rises and ships rise". Compared to personal hard work, everyone cares more about the development of the company, and physical fatigue does not reduce everyone's enthusiasm for work. To achieve the dual commitment of delivering on time and ensuring quality and quantity to German customers, everyone is racing against time with a high sense of responsibility and urgency, showcasing "speed and passion".

In the face of heavy production tasks, company leaders are at the forefront. After receiving production tasks, they carefully analyze and coordinate arrangements in the first time, analyze and judge possible problems in the production process in advance, develop rigorous and feasible production plans and guarantee measures, and ensure that the production progress is promoted quickly and orderly with quality and quantity guaranteed.

The workshop is like a battlefield, where several leaders are both commanders and soldiers. They not only need to carefully deploy production plans and strictly control operational processes, but also often lead by example and fight alongside frontline employees.

Chen Dejian, the head of the Production Planning Department, saw that his work clothes were already covered in oil stains. The workload of more than ten hours a day did not break him down. Even though the busy work made Chen's figure appear a bit tired, he still happily said, "Brothers, working hard is not a big deal, as long as it does not delay the project schedule."

The serious and responsible work attitude of the leaders, who strive for excellence, deeply inspires every employee. Under their leadership, the employees have put in a twelve point spirit, fully sprinting, and striving to complete the arduous and heavy production tasks with "quality and quantity guaranteed".

Under heavy pressure, only those who can demonstrate their abilities can take the lead. These Guangtong people, who are concerned about the enterprise, have a broad understanding of the overall situation, and have a strong sense of responsibility and mission, have laid a solid foundation for the company to expand into the EU market. Thank you to every hardworking and dedicated Guangtong person. Your spirit of unity and hard work has made the company's progress more steady and powerful!

en.title: Camel Ring from Lanzhou to Berlin - Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile Co., Ltd.'s pure electric city bus made a grand appearance at the German VDV Electric Bus Conference
en.summary: "Where is Lanzhou in China?"Almost every European customer visiting Lanzhou Guangtong electric bus will ask this question.Some of them have visited China, know Beijing, Shanghai, Shenzhen, this time they remember Lanzhou...
body: "Where is Lanzhou in China?"Almost every European customer visiting Lanzhou Guangtong electric bus will ask this question.Some of them have visited China, know Beijing, Shanghai, Shenzhen, this time they remember Lanzhou and Lanzhou new energy bus.

On March 5, the VDV electric bus conference and trade fair opened in Berlin, the VDV electric bus conference and trade fair is one of the most professional and authoritative exhibitions in the German bus industry, and its strong influence, high level of content and specialization lead the direction of the development of buses in Germany and the whole of Europe.The exhibited products are the most cutting-edge and advanced scientific and technological achievements in the world.90 industrial chain enterprises participated in the Berlin VDV exhibition, of which 20 new energy bus manufacturers, more than 70 parts suppliers, more than 1,500 professionals and media visited the Berlin VDV exhibition.Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile Co., Ltd. exhibited the company's latest 12-meter CAMBELL pure electric city bus at this exhibition.

CAMBELL is the meaning of camel bell, which is a symbol of trade on the Silk Road, and Lanzhou Guangtong's predecessor is Gansu Tuoling Bus Factory.Today, the melodious camel bell of the new era echoes in Berlin, the capital of Germany.

Lanzhou Guangtung's CAMBELL electric bus project received strong support from the NRW International Business Office directly under the Government of North Rhine-Westphalia, the City of Bottrop and the Chinese Consulate General in Dusseldorf during the initial stage of establishment and development!This VDV bus exhibition, Lanzhou Guangtong Cambell pure electric city bus to "we provide you with 1:1 electric bus solutions" as the theme, exhibited 12 meters pure electric classic city bus.With its leading new energy technology and unique exterior design, the model has attracted many customers since its debut.Mr. Tischler, the mayor of Botrop, went to the VDV bus Exhibition in Berlin and acted as a "salesman" for CAMBELL electric buses!

The representatives of Lanzhou Guangtong CAMBELL project had in-depth exchanges with leaders and representatives of transport enterprises from many cities in Germany and Switzerland, Austria, Belgium and other countries, and received positive responses:Martin Schmitz, president of the German VDV Transport Business Association, toured the CAMBELL in detail and highly praised the bus. After hearing that different battery systems can be used, Schmitz pointed out: "The super fast charging technology of LTO batteries is very important, and the 1:1 solution can help bus companies save a lot of money."
Martin Schmidt, the president of Vestische (German public transport company) said: "A very beautiful bus, which fully meets the VDV standards and the German transport industry standards."

Bernd Tischler (mayor of Bottrop, Germany) commented: "The CAMBELL electric bus represents the mainstream achievements of electric buses in the field of technology, environmental protection and energy saving, passenger comfort and stylish appearance."

At this exhibition, Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile Co., Ltd. proposed the concept of "1:1" for the first time, what is "1:1"?In the critical stage of the German public transport system from diesel power to new energy power, many bus companies found that after replacing traditional fuel buses with electric buses, there were many problems, such as insufficient buses and drivers, changes in operating schedules, longer working hours for drivers, and high additional costs.

In response to customer problems, Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile Co., Ltd. proposed a "1:1" electric bus solution, which not only provides customers with buses that meet the German VDV standard, but also provides buses with LTO and LFP two battery technologies, and tailors 1:1 bus solutions and charging station construction solutions.This means that compared with the original diesel fleet, the 1:1 electric bus solution can achieve the number of buses 1:1, the number of drivers 1:1, and the operating schedule is still 1:1.Truly deliver the green, clean and low-cost electric bus to customers.

The model of the exhibition is CAMBELL 12m LTO pure electric city bus, which is equipped with the most stable and safe lithium titanate battery in the world, and with the super-power roof fast charging and bus side fast charging dual charging system, it can achieve fast charging speed, SOC 30%-90% can be completed in about 12 minutes.Greatly improve the safety and efficiency of bus operation.CO2 fluoride-free air conditioning and a new VDV compliant cockpit make the driving process more environmentally friendly, more comfortable and safer.In addition, LTO city buses can achieve a ratio of 1:10 between charging piles and buses, greatly reducing the area and construction costs of charging stations.

LFP pure electric city bus of Lanzhou Guangtong New Energy Automobile Co., Ltd also has excellent performance, LFP pure electric city bus has strong stability, high energy density lithium iron phosphate battery, lightweight body design and low-power components, resulting in lower energy consumption and longer endurance, long-distance travel, no need to recharge, one step direct.The IP68 protection grade enhances the adaptability of the three-power system to various rain weather, maintains the good insulation of the three-power system, makes the bus run reliably for a long time, reduces the frequency of maintenance, and saves the cost of use.In addition, the whole bus is equipped with intelligent network facilities, scientific arrangement of space layout, to provide drivers with a comfortable and efficient driving experience, so that passengers have a more comfortable bus experience.
